---
title: ""
format:
  typst:
    margin:
      top: 0.35in
      bottom: 0.35in
      left: 0.5in
      right: 0.5in
    font-size: 9pt
    mainfont: "Segoe UI"
---

```{=typst}
#set text(size: 9pt, fill: rgb("#333"))
#set par(justify: true, leading: 0.52em)
#set list(indent: 0.3em, body-indent: 0.4em, spacing: 3.5pt)

// Color palette
#let primary = rgb("#2c3e50")
#let accent = rgb("#3498db")
#let light-bg = rgb("#f0f4f8")
#let muted = rgb("#555")
#let light-border = rgb("#dce1e6")

// ── Header banner ──
#block(
  width: 100%,
  fill: primary,
  radius: 4pt,
  inset: (x: 16pt, y: 12pt),
)[
  #align(center)[
    #text(size: 20pt, weight: "bold", fill: white)[Robert Kimutai]
    #v(-2pt)
    #text(size: 9.5pt, fill: rgb("#b0c4d8"))[Engineer · Data Scientist · Researcher · Developer]
    #v(4pt)
    #text(size: 7.5pt, fill: rgb("#d0dce8"), tracking: 0.3pt)[
      #link("mailto:robert.kimutai.ds@gmail.com")[robert.kimutai.ds\@gmail.com]  ·  +254 723 493122  ·  #link("https://www.linkedin.com/in/robert-kimutai-921608330/")[LinkedIn]  ·  #link("https://github.com/RobertKimutai-DS")[GitHub]  ·  #link("https://robertkimutai-ds.github.io/Portfolio/")[Portfolio Website]  ·  Nairobi, Kenya
    ]
  ]
]

#v(5pt)

// ── Helpers ──
#let section(title) = {
  v(6pt)
  block(width: 100%)[
    #grid(
      columns: (auto, 1fr),
      column-gutter: 8pt,
      align: (left + horizon, horizon),
      text(size: 10.5pt, weight: "bold", fill: primary, tracking: 0.5pt)[#upper(title)],
      line(length: 100%, stroke: 0.6pt + light-border),
    )
  ]
  v(3pt)
}

#let entry(title, subtitle, date, location: none, details: none) = {
  block(
    width: 100%,
    inset: (left: 6pt),
    stroke: (left: 2pt + accent),
  )[
    #grid(
      columns: (1fr, auto),
      align: (left, right),
      text(weight: "bold", size: 9pt, fill: primary)[#title],
      text(fill: accent, weight: "semibold", size: 7.5pt)[#date],
    )
    #if subtitle != none {
      grid(
        columns: (1fr, auto),
        align: (left, right),
        text(style: "italic", size: 8.5pt, fill: muted)[#subtitle],
        if location != none { text(style: "italic", fill: muted, size: 7.5pt)[#location] },
      )
    }
    #if details != none {
      v(1pt)
      details
    }
  ]
  v(4pt)
}

#let skill-row(category, items) = {
  grid(
    columns: (130pt, 1fr),
    align: (left, left),
    text(weight: "bold", size: 8.5pt, fill: primary)[#category],
    text(size: 8pt, fill: rgb("#444"))[#items],
  )
  v(2pt)
}

// ══════════════════ CONTENT ══════════════════

#section[Professional Summary]

#block(
  width: 100%,
  fill: light-bg,
  radius: 3pt,
  inset: 8pt,
)[
  #text(size: 8.5pt)[Software engineer with a technical background in environmental, water, and renewable energy systems. Designs and builds complete platforms end-to-end: a national health insurance system architected for 54M citizens (28 API endpoints), county government revenue tools, and IoT sensor networks. Combines systems thinking with automation at every layer, from multi-package R backends with CI/CD pipelines to 9-stage hardware simulation workflows. Works primarily in R, Python, and TypeScript with AI-augmented development as standard practice.]
]

#section[Work Experience]

#entry(
  [Freelance Researcher / Data Scientist / Developer],
  [Self-employed],
  [Jan 2025 -- Present],
  location: [Nairobi],
  details: list(
    [Architected SHA Health System -- 4-package R platform (Plumber API, Golem/Shiny, React PWA) with Isolation Forest fraud detection, PostGIS spatial analytics, and 28 JWT endpoints targeting 54M citizens],
    [Built SmartLicenSync -- 11-module Golem/Shiny revenue platform for Kericho County with PostgreSQL/PostGIS, M-Pesa integration, and RBAC audit logging],
    [Developing ESP32 IoT sensor node with custom KiCad PCB and Python/PySpice simulation pipeline for ASAE S580.1 solar cooker testing],
    [Producing reproducible reports and dashboards using Quarto, R Markdown, and Git-based workflows],
  )
)

#entry(
  [Clerk of Works -- Water & Solar Infrastructure],
  [SIVAP, Ministry of Agriculture],
  [Feb 2022 -- Nov 2024],
  location: [Various Counties],
  details: list(
    [Supervised earth dams, solarized boreholes, solar pumping systems, and water distribution networks],
    [Ensured contractor compliance with BOQs, technical specs, and project timelines],
    [Compiled field data and produced progress reports using Excel, AutoCAD, and standardized templates],
  )
)

#entry(
  [Design Engineer],
  [Kupata Technologies],
  [May 2019 -- Dec 2021],
  location: [Nairobi],
  details: list(
    [Designed solar water pumping and drip irrigation systems; produced AutoCAD layouts and BOQs],
    [Performed site assessments (soil, water, solar resource) and delivered client training materials],
  )
)

#entry(
  [Bakery Manager],
  [Mini Bakeries Limited],
  [Feb 2015 -- Mar 2016],
  details: list(
    [Managed production planning, quality control, and inventory; tracked sales data to reduce waste],
  )
)

#section[Education]

#entry(
  [MSc Environmental and Biosystems Engineering],
  [University of Nairobi],
  [Sept 2023 -- Present],
  location: [Nairobi],
  details: text(size: 8.5pt, style: "italic")[Thesis: A Low-Cost, IoT-Based Framework for Linking Standardized Performance to the Multidimensional Impacts of Solar Cookers]
)

#entry(
  [BSc Agricultural Engineering (Double Degree Program)],
  [JKUAT],
  [2009 -- 2018],
  location: [Juja],
  details: text(size: 8.5pt, style: "italic")[Thesis: Development of an Automated Irrigation System Based on Crop Water Stress Index]
)

#section[Traineeships & Certifications]

#entry(
  [Erasmus Mobility Traineeship -- Hydrological Modeling & Precision Agriculture],
  [Çukurova University, Turkey],
  [Oct -- Dec 2025],
  details: list(
    [Calibration of ArcSWAT parameters via Remote Sensing and Hydrochemical Analysis],
    [Hands-on training in precision agriculture techniques and watershed delineation using GIS tools],
  )
)

#entry(
  [Advanced Diploma in Data Science with R],
  [Alison (Online)],
  [2024],
  details: list(
    [Data preparation and wrangling, predictive modeling, data visualization with real-world datasets],
  )
)

#entry(
  [Diploma in Machine Learning with R Studio],
  [Alison (Online)],
  [2023],
  details: list(
    [Supervised and unsupervised learning, decision trees, clustering, model validation using caret],
  )
)

#entry(
  [Statistical Data Analysis Using R],
  [RUFORUM (Regional Universities Forum)],
  [2022],
  details: list(
    [Descriptive/inferential statistics, regression analysis, hypothesis testing in agricultural research],
  )
)

#section[Technical Skills]

#v(2pt)
#block(
  width: 100%,
  fill: light-bg,
  radius: 3pt,
  inset: 8pt,
)[
  #skill-row([AI/ML & Data Science], [R, Python, tidymodels, XGBoost, Isolation Forest, DALEX, ggplot2, Feature Engineering, Time Series Analysis])
  #skill-row([Systems & Software], [Golem/Shiny, Plumber REST API, React/TypeScript, PostgreSQL/PostGIS, Docker Compose, JWT/RBAC, Git/GitHub Actions, nginx])
  #skill-row([Hardware & IoT], [ESP32/Arduino, KiCad PCB Design, Proteus 8, PySpice/LTspice, MicroPython, Sensor Systems (BPW34, PT100, DHT22)])
  #skill-row([Reporting & Research], [Quarto/R Markdown, LaTeX, Excel, Zotero, Reproducible Pipelines, Technical Report Writing, Plotly/Leaflet])
  #skill-row([Engineering & Domain], [ArcSWAT, QGIS, AutoCAD, Systems Thinking, Process Automation, Sustainability Modeling, Impact Analysis, Experimental Design])
  #skill-row([Project Management], [Site inspection & supervision, BOQ validation, Milestone reporting, Stakeholder documentation, Field logistics])
]

#section[Professional Affiliations]

#grid(
  columns: (1fr, auto),
  align: (left, right),
  text(size: 9pt)[*Registered Graduate Engineer* -- Engineers Board of Kenya (ERB), Reg. No. B16657],
  text(fill: accent, weight: "semibold", size: 7.5pt)[2019 -- Present],
)

#section[References]

#v(2pt)
#grid(
  columns: (1fr, 1fr, 1fr),
  column-gutter: 10pt,
  block(
    width: 100%,
    fill: light-bg,
    radius: 3pt,
    inset: 7pt,
  )[
    #text(weight: "bold", size: 8pt, fill: primary)[Eng. Prof. Duncan Mbuge] \
    #text(size: 7pt, fill: muted)[Assoc. Dean, School of Engineering \ University of Nairobi] \
    #v(2pt)
    #text(size: 7pt)[+254 725 949096] \
    #text(size: 7pt, fill: accent)[#link("mailto:duncan.mbuge@uonbi.ac.ke")[duncan.mbuge\@uonbi.ac.ke]]
  ],
  block(
    width: 100%,
    fill: light-bg,
    radius: 3pt,
    inset: 7pt,
  )[
    #text(weight: "bold", size: 8pt, fill: primary)[Eng. Jonah Kebeney] \
    #text(size: 7pt, fill: muted)[Project Manager, SIVAP \ Ministry of Agriculture] \
    #v(2pt)
    #text(size: 7pt)[+254 720 837775] \
    #text(size: 7pt, fill: accent)[#link("mailto:kebeneyjonah21@gmail.com")[kebeneyjonah21\@gmail.com]]
  ],
  block(
    width: 100%,
    fill: light-bg,
    radius: 3pt,
    inset: 7pt,
  )[
    #text(weight: "bold", size: 8pt, fill: primary)[Eng. Raymond Bebora] \
    #text(size: 7pt, fill: muted)[Regional Manager \ Kupata Technologies] \
    #v(2pt)
    #text(size: 7pt)[+254 720 422249] \
    #text(size: 7pt, fill: accent)[#link("mailto:rmwalauzi@gmail.com")[rmwalauzi\@gmail.com]]
  ],
)
```
